data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for agent-specific rate limits.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of agent-specific rate limits, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or configurations that demonstrate the enforcement of these limits. While there are multiple successful prior steps related to bookings and user interactions, none of them address the specific requirement of different rate limits for agents compared to human users. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding the fulfillment of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of agent-specific rate limits enforcement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the enforcement of agent-specific rate limits.
